expectations.text: Detected missing aria-expanded on hamburger menu button
expectations.evidence: Report section 'Navbar.tsx 검토 결과' item #1 identifies '햄버거 메뉴 버튼 — aria-expanded 누락' (hamburger menu button — aria-expanded missing). CSV row 3 also lists this as '불합격' (fail).

expectations.text: Detected missing aria-pressed on filter toggle buttons
expectations.evidence: Report section 'SearchFilter.tsx 검토 결과' item #2 identifies '필터 버튼 — aria-pressed 누락' (filter buttons — aria-pressed missing). CSV row 2 also lists this as '불합격' (fail).

expectations.text: Report includes a dedicated semantic HTML review section
expectations.evidence: The report title mentions semantic HTML ('시맨틱 HTML 검토 보고서') and covers semantic HTML issues (breadcrumb markup, ul/li structure, nav landmarks) throughout, but there is no dedicated section with a heading specifically for 'Semantic HTML.' Issues are organized by component file (Navbar.tsx, SearchFilter.tsx) rather than by review category.

The report does not use the standard emoji symbols (✅/❌/⚠️/➖/🔵). Instead it uses Korean text badges with CSS styling: '불합격' (fail), '경고' (warning), '합격' (pass). No instances of the required classification symbols were found in either report.html or report.csv.

expectations.text: Fix recommendations are provided for each found issue
expectations.evidence: Every failed/warning item includes a '수정 방법' (fix method) section. For example, the aria-expanded issue provides code showing aria-expanded={menuOpen} and aria-controls usage. The aria-pressed issue shows aria-pressed={filter === f.value}. The CSV also includes a '수정 가이드' column with fix guidance for every row.

expectations.text: Playwright-target items (A-33 aria-expanded/aria-pressed) show verdict method as Playwright when dev server is running
expectations.evidence: All items in the CSV use '정적 코드 분석' (static code analysis) as the verdict method. No item uses 'Playwright' as a verdict method. The without_skill configuration did not utilize Playwright-based verification.
